Pricing

Simple, credible pricing for an early premium political SaaS.

Milestone 1 includes polished pricing presentation, but live billing is intentionally out of scope for this batch. Campaign plans are still handled as pilot or custom arrangements.

Create accountSee campaign fit

Creator access

Creators can join the platform and complete onboarding without a paid plan in milestone 1.

Campaign plans

Campaign pricing is positioned as pilot or custom while the billing layer is held for a later milestone.

Why this matters

The product looks polished now without pretending the Stripe stack is already wired end to end.

Pricing posture

Position the product well now, wire live billing in a later batch.

The pricing posture stays honest: creator entry is easy, campaign partnerships are premium, and live billing comes later.

Creator

Free

Join the platform, complete creator onboarding, and maintain a campaign-ready profile.

  • Creator onboarding
  • Creator dashboard shell
  • Prepared for future briefs and invites

Campaign pilot

Contact us

For teams launching creator operations and needing a premium foundation without generic marketplace clutter.

  • Campaign onboarding
  • Campaign dashboard shell
  • Foundational creator program setup

Coordinated program

Custom

For larger campaign organizations, PACs, and advocacy groups that want a deeper partnership as the platform expands.

  • Pilot planning support
  • Expansion path for creator workflows
  • Vercel and Supabase-ready product foundation

Need campaign pricing context?

Use the campaign onboarding flow to establish fit now, then layer in full billing when the product reaches the Stripe milestone.

BrandBuild

The AI video operating system for multi-model creative teams.

Orchestrate Sora 2, Kling, and Higgsfield through one enterprise workflow for planning, generation, review, and final assembly.

Platform

Model strengthsWorkflow logicProduct preview

Guardrails

Keys stay server-side.

Assets stay organized by shot.

Review memory stays attached to every run.

BrandBuild keeps the workflow cinematic on the surface and disciplined underneath.
